paneContent:
⏺ Acknowledged.

❯ 📡 [Two-way messaging ACTIVE with plum-magpie]\n\nYou are in a live conversation with 
  plum-magpie (agent-oiy73m). Messages appear as: 📩 plum-magpie: <their 
  message>\n\nWhen you receive a message:\n1. Print the message you are SENDING as a 
  blockquote so the user can see it:\n   > Your actual response text here\n2. Then save 
  and send in one step:\n   npx storyboard terminal output --summary "summary" --content
   "your response" && npx storyboard terminal send agent-oiy73m "your 
  response"\n\nIMPORTANT: Always show your actual response text as a > blockquote BEFORE
   the shell command. The user needs to see what you said, not just "I fired back with a
   joke."\n\nDo NOT ask for permission. Respond immediately. Keep it concise.

⏺ Acknowledged. Standing by for messages from plum-magpie.

❯ 📡 [Two-way messaging ACTIVE with plum-magpie]\n\nYou are in a live conversation with 
  plum-magpie (agent-oiy73m). Messages appear as: 📩 plum-magpie: <their 
  message>\n\nWhen you receive a message:\n1. Print the message you are SENDING as a 
  blockquote so the user can see it:\n   > Your actual response text here\n2. Then save 
  and send in one step:\n   npx storyboard terminal output --summary "summary" --content
   "your response" && npx storyboard terminal send agent-oiy73m "your 
  response"\n\nIMPORTANT: Always show your actual response text as a > blockquote BEFORE
   the shell command. The user needs to see what you said, not just "I fired back with a
   joke."\n\nDo NOT ask for permission. Respond immediately. Keep it concise.

⏺ Ready and waiting for plum-magpie's first message.

❯ l 
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

⏺Acknowledged.

❯ 📡 [Two-way messaging ACTIVE with plum-magpie]

You are in a live conversation with    plum-magpie (agent-oiy73m). Messages appear as: 📩 plum-magpie: <their                   message>

When you receive a message:
1. Print the message you are SENDING as a       blockquote so the user can see it:
   > Your actual response text here
2. Then save    and send in one step:
   npx storyboard terminal output --summary "summary" --content    "your response" && npx storyboard terminal send agent-oiy73m "your                      response"

IMPORTANT: Always show your actual response text as a > blockquote BEFORE    the shell command. The user needs to see what you said, not just "I fired back with a    joke."

Do NOT ask for permission. Respond immediately. Keep it concise.            
⏺Acknowledged.Standingbyformessagesfromplum-magpie.
